title: Chapter 21 Summary
main_description: Orange Town reaches its aftermath after Buggy’s defeat. Luffy, Zoro, and Nami leave behind a damaged but recovering town, while Mayor Boodle and Chouchou give the arc its emotional closure.
key_events: Buggy’s crew is left in confusion after the defeat.
Mayor Boodle and the villagers confront the damage done to Orange Town.
Nami leaves with the treasure as the crew continues toward the next island.
